title: New Roth Conversion Source Controls
subtitle: Message from Ron
intro: Roth conversions now have clearer source choices. The default still uses the higher available IRA, but you can now choose a different source or split conversions between two people.

items.title: Choose the conversion source
items.body: Use Higher IRA, Lower IRA, Person 1 first, Person 2 first, or Percent split. A 50/50 split is supported, and the other IRA can finish the target if one side runs short.

items.title: Change it by year range
items.body: The new Roth Conversion Source strategy lets you change the source for selected years without changing the Roth conversion target itself.

items.title: Easier Cash Flow audit
items.body: Cash Flow now breaks Roth conversions into separate Person 1 and Person 2 columns, so the taxable conversion total is easier to trace.
